name: yoroll-test-plugin
description: Choose a Yoroll intent anonymously, authenticate on first creation, and keep the DEV result visible.

interface.shortDescription: Create workflows and media with Yoroll MCP
interface.longDescription: A test-environment preview that keeps Yoroll open as a visible DEV workspace, uses one public MCP App card to choose an intent, collects parameters through conversation, and defers host-owned OAuth until the first confirmed creation. Every business change uses an OAuth-protected Yoroll MCP tool; a short-lived one-time handoff opens the completed result in the Browser.
defaultPrompt: Create an interactive game with Yoroll
Show my Yoroll projects and continue one
Generate a standalone image or video with Yoroll
